summary: fix(signin): Check if session is valid for isFirefoxNonSync before rendering cached signin
description:
Because:
* Now that we offer cached sign-in for non-Sync service browser sign-ins, FxA can show a stale cached sign in page when the user signs out from the browser menu

This commit:
* Adds a "session is verified" check for Firefox client IDs that have a non-Sync 'service' param before we render cached sign-in

closes FXA-13022
